channel.title: AiRSS Crawl Log
channel.description: Daily scraping run reports for the AiRSS feeds

item.title: Crawl Report 2026-07-08 — no new articles
item.description:
Run 2026-07-08 17:32–17:34 UTC · duration 1m 28s · 17/17 sources OK

17 sources had no new articles: claude_blog, qwen_blog_en, qwen_blog_zh, bytedance_seed_zh, zhipuai_news, minimax_news, minimax_blog, kling_blog, mistral_news, openai_blog, deepmind_blog, nvidia_news, nvidia_blog, meta_ai_blog, apple_newsroom, apple_ml_highlights, microsoft_ai_news
